case_title: VICTORIA, HALLIE Q. vs. BUCK, CYNTHIA et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BUCK, CYNTHIA BUCK, JENNIFER DALTON, GOVINDA
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, CALENDAR OF FEB-01-1995, DENIED FAILED TO APPEAR FOR HEARING.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUCK, CYNTHIA BUCK, JENNIFER DALTON, GOVINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2880 FOLSOM ST., STAYED UNTIL MAR-05-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFTS. WAIVE LAST MONTH'S RENT; EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS; IF DEFTS. COMPLY WITH TERMS PLTF. WILL WAIVE ALL BACK RENT AND DAMAGES THAT MAY BE OWED; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS) JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.
